analysis.summary: Appsmith is a full-stack low-code platform that enables users to build custom internal applications like dashboards and admin panels through a visual interface with drag-and-drop widgets, database connections, and API integrations.
capabilities: Provides a visual application builder with drag-and-drop UI widgets and components (app/client/src/widgets/)
Connects to multiple data sources including databases, REST APIs, and cloud services (app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/datasources/)
Executes JavaScript code and queries within the application context (app/client/src/workers/)
Manages user authentication and authorization with multiple providers (app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/authentication/)
Deploys applications with containerized infrastructure (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml)
Provides real-time collaboration features for multi-user application development (app/client/src/sagas/)
Supports custom theming and branding through design system components (app/client/packages/design-system/)
integrations: AWS S3 for file storage (@aws-sdk/client-s3 in package.json)
Redis for caching and session management

api_endpoints.summary: Execute database queries or API calls (app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/controllers/ActionController.java)

technical_facts: Provides a visual application builder with drag-and-drop UI widgets and components (app/client/src/widgets/)
Connects to multiple data sources including databases, REST APIs, and cloud services (app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/datasources/)

Provides real-time collaboration features for multi-user application development (app/client/src/sagas/)
Supports custom theming and branding through design system components (app/client/packages/design-system/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: async - React frontend with Redux-Saga for side effects, Spring WebFlux reactive backend with non-blocking I/O
dependencies: Spring Boot, Spring WebFlux, Spring Security (backend)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Manages application state across UI widgets, data sources, and user sessions with persistent storage in MongoDB. Evidence: 'app/client/src/widgets/', 'app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/datasources/', MongoDB database configuration
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Uses TypeScript for frontend type safety and Spring Boot with Java for backend structure, but allows flexible JSON data through MongoDB and API integrations. Evidence: 'React (TypeScript frontend)', 'Spring Boot (Java backend)', 'MongoDB (database)'
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Primary operations are Create, Read, Update, Delete for applications, data sources, actions, and pages. Evidence: API endpoints '/api/v1/applications', '/api/v1/datasources', '/api/v1/actions', '/api/v1/pages' with GET/POST methods
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Uses Redis for caching and session management with real-time collaboration features. Evidence: 'Redis (caching)', 'Provides real-time collaboration features for multi-user application development (app/client/src/sagas/)'
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to generic visual builder architecture, database-agnostic design, and REST API patterns. The drag-and-drop UI framework and data source abstraction layer are highly reusable for any domain requiring custom application development.

evidence_claims.evidence: Provides a visual application builder with drag-and-drop UI widgets and components (app/client/src/widgets/)
Connects to multiple data sources including databases, REST APIs, and cloud services (app/server/appsmith-server/src/main/java/com/appsmith/server/datasources/)
Executes JavaScript code and queries within the application context (app/client/src/workers/)
OAuth2 (Google, GitHub, OIDC providers), SAML, LDAP, Form-based authentication, JWT tokens
Deploys applications with containerized infrastructure (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml)

information_gaps: Specific widget types and customization capabilities
Data source connection limits and throughput
